notes: Money matters now. New Money tab: a savings account that earns interest, investments (Index / Stocks / Crypto) that swing every week, and a shop of life-changing assets (car, nicer apartment, gym, laptop, therapist, insurance, getaway). Jobs and business are far clearer — one progress bar at a time. Real decision events with consequences, and interviews and client wins are now skill-weighted gambles with visible odds. Net worth is your score. Note: this overhaul resets your previous save.
